title: crotalaria turgida
intro: Crotalaria turgida, also known as the 'turgid rattlebox', is a plant species in the pea family (Fabaceae) that is native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Crotalaria turgida include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
